SOME LIES COST MORE THAN OTHERS.

About the Book

WHEN LOVE TURNS
INTO CALCULATION

Dean and Elena's marriage has been dead for years, even if both of them are still living under the same roof. Behind the quiet rooms, cold silences, and ordinary morning routines lies a relationship poisoned by betrayal, resentment, and secrets neither of them is willing to forgive.

Dean has spent years hiding his affairs, pretending his lies have no consequences. Elena has spent years watching, collecting proof, and waiting for the moment when pretending is no longer enough. But when another woman enters the picture and old wounds rise to the surface, their broken marriage turns into something far more dangerous.

Told through multiple perspectives, Every Lie Has A Price is a dark psychological thriller about deception, obsession, revenge, and the terrifying moment when love turns into calculation.

In a house where everyone is hiding something, the truth may not set anyone free.

What's Inside

🔪

Domestic Suspense

Behind closed doors, the most dangerous threats aren't strangers — they're the people who sleep beside you.

🧠

Psychological Tension

Multiple perspectives that twist the truth. Every chapter reframes what you thought you knew.

🩸

Obsession & Revenge

Elena has been patient. She has been watching. And she has been keeping score.

"SOME SECRETS DON'T STAY HIDDEN.
THEY COME BACK TO CLAIM WHAT'S OWED."
— Every Lie Has a Price

About the Author

DAVID JORDAN

Debut Author  ·  Tulsa, Oklahoma

Based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, David Jordan is a debut author and ultrasound specialist. A father of four children and eight grandchildren, he draws inspiration from science, family, and the complexities of human nature.

In Every Lie Has a Price, Jordan channels his fascination with the hidden architecture of ordinary lives — the routines people maintain to keep their secrets safe, and the moment those routines finally crack.

DEAN IS ABOUT
TO LEARN HIS.
